description: Precision timing and fashionable style make a wonderful combination in this watch from esprit. This range of watches perfectly capture the ESPRIT eye for perfection and are great for urban wear - transitioning perfectly from day to night. Case diameter: 47 mmCase thickness: 8 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: Two YearsStainless steel case with rotating bezelTextured black rubber strap with tang claspBlack dial with white and silver hands and hour marks and a pink second hand3-faced multifunction displayLogo on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant
